Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Ways to inundate the internet with KC

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-10-05 · 8 answers
Since there is so much nonsense on the internet i thought what could we do to inundate the internet with krishna related material.

I am not talking about setting up websites and all that complicated stuff. I just mean things some of us can do just by using some popular sites.
Maybe orchestrate a mega upload campaign to flickr and youtube? What about myspace?

any other sites?
user [2] · 2007-10-05
good idea!!!
it must be coordinated though... maybe using the wiki for possible sites, listing resources for material and monitor our postings?
user [38] · 2007-10-06
Yes, thats for the wiki. So far not much input there though.
user [19] · 2007-10-06
apart from flickr and youtube which other sites do you recommend to upload stuff?

any other for audio?
user [2] · 2007-10-06
www.odeo.com
also to create a internet radio with music classes, etc at www.paltalk.com
user [2] · 2007-10-06
New Page created to begin the mission:
http://www.pariprashnena.com/pmwiki/index.php?n=Main.Inundate (password protected)
user [179] · 2007-10-06
very nice !!!

the online.net bhaktyaa resource for krsna conciouss persons. or any interesting...

very nice !
user [38] · 2007-10-06
Mishraji, imho it fits the current http://www.pariprashnena.com/pmwiki/index.php?n=Main.Resources
user [2] · 2007-10-06
yes, i meant some way of keeping the count of who and what is been done
